name: kill-switch
notes: One message kills a whole matchday's fresh slices. Both fixtures have an approved three-question fresh slice. KILL is sent at min 85 — by which time F1 (15:00) is ALREADY STAGED with its fresh questions frozen into the pack, while F2 (16:00) has not been assembled yet. Both must end up base-only: F2 assembles without fresh, and F1's frozen pack is re-assembled base-only at the whistle. Neither released pack may contain a single fresh question.
